case_title: WILLIAM B SKEHAN VS. BLACK & DECKER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-28-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-28-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION ORDER WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Patricia Van Steenberge. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2003 Continued To Jul-28-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/28/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR #7782. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-02-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in pro per is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)
